_comment: ch1tty focus-profile suggestions catalog — 204 combos, 143 verified (twenty-seventh-pass 2026-06-06)

finance.description: Billing, payments, and financial ecosystem tools — now extended with the append-only ChittyLedger (ledger-mcp) and ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp) for immutable audit trails and billing workflow tracking. NOTE: stripe, tasks, and ledger backends were NOT connected on the live gateway at generation time — combos involving them are verified:false. Stripe tool names follow the @stripe/mcp surface and are plausible but unverified.

combos.name: invoice-to-ledger-tracker
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent Stripe invoices and write each into a Notion finance tracker database as a page — turning billing state into a queryable, human-readable ledger view.
combos.notes: stripe not connected (lazy); stripe/list_invoices inferred from @stripe/mcp surface. notion/API-post-page is verified.

combos.name: new-customer-onboarding-record
combos.accomplishes: Create a Stripe customer, log the customer record into Notion, and open a GitHub issue to track onboarding follow-up work — a three-backend chain spanning payments, docs, and engineering.
combos.notes: stripe inferred (not connected). notion/API-post-page verified. github not connected (2026-06-04).

combos.name: payment-failure-triage
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate failed/pending Stripe payment intents, reason over likely causes and remediation order with sequential-thinking, then record the triage plan as a Notion page.
combos.notes: stripe inferred. thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: invoice-to-immutable-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent Stripe invoices and append each as an immutable entry to the ChittyLedger — creating an auditable, append-only financial record that cannot be altered after the fact.
combos.notes: stripe inferred (not connected). ledger/append_entry from apps/ledger-mcp — in config (enabled:false). This is the core finance-immutability combo: Stripe is the source of truth for billing; the ledger is the durable audit anchor.

combos.name: billing-task-and-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Create a billing remediation task in ChittyAgent Tasks and simultaneously append a ledger entry recording the intent — so the task's existence is anchored in the immutable ledger before it can be lost or modified.
combos.notes: tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). ledger/append_entry from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). Both are new apps/*-mcp surfaces — shortest cross-backend finance combo.

combos.name: ledger-to-finance-brief
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent ChittyLedger entries for a financial namespace, reason over them with sequential-thinking to identify anomalies or trends, and write a finance brief into Notion — turning raw ledger state into an actionable narrative.
combos.notes: ledger/list_entries from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page are verified on the live gateway.

combos.name: financial-context-brief
combos.accomplishes: Search RAG evidence for financial and billing context (Chitty pricing docs, payment patterns, ledger policy), reason about implications and action items, create a structured finance brief in Notion — a useful fallback until stripe/ledger/tasks backends connect
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (evidence, thinking, notion). Verified 2026-06-05 fifth-pass. Works as a research-only finance workflow until Stripe/ledger are connected. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: financial-doc-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Read financial documents or data exports from filesystem (CSV/JSON billing reports, ledger snapshots), reason about key metrics, anomalies, and action items, document structured summary in Notion
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking, notion). Verified 2026-06-05 fifth-pass. Works with locally-synced financial data files. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: local-finance-doc-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Read a local financial data file (CSV/JSON billing export, ledger snapshot, invoice list) and reason about key metrics, anomalies, and trends — a pure local workflow that works when financial data is already synced to disk.
combos.notes: Both tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking). 2026-06-05 seventh-pass. Cast scores: fs/read_text_file (1.0 for read intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.50 for analyze/reason intent). No Notion/Stripe/ledger dependency — fully verified in remote container.

combos.name: multi-finance-doc-synthesis
combos.accomplishes: Search a directory for financial exports and reports (matching patterns like '*.csv' or '*invoice*'), batch-read all matches simultaneously, then synthesize cross-period insights and anomalies — useful for comparing monthly billing reports or aggregating audit exports.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers (fs, thinking). 2026-06-05 seventh-pass. Cast scores: fs/search_files (0.56 for search-files intent), fs/read_multiple_files (0.50 for read-multiple-files intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.50 for analyze intent). No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: financial-page-brief
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a financial report page, dashboard, or investor doc as clean markdown via the browser-rendering service, reason over key data points, anomalies, and trends with sequential-thinking, then write a finance brief to a local file — useful for quickly digesting external financial data without manual extraction.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: browser-rendering/get_url_markdown (0.6 as alternative), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). browser-rendering confirmed connected (toolCount: 3). Extends page-to-markdown-archive (ends at fs/write_file) with reasoning step. No auth-gated backends required NOTE: browser-rendering returned 401 in 15th-pass session (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation in the session noted above, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: financial-page-screenshot-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Capture a screenshot of a financial dashboard or reporting page, analyze the visible financial indicators and chart data with reasoning, write a financial snapshot — captures visual dashboard state vs existing financial-page-brief which fetches as markdown.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed 2026-06-05: browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot (0.33), thinking/sequentialthinking (0.40), fs/write_file (confirmed). Novel: uses screenshot (visual) vs existing financial-page-brief which uses get_url_markdown NOTE: browser-rendering returned 401 in 15th-pass session (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation in the session noted above, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: finance-agent-skill-pipeline
combos.accomplishes: Discover the finance agent in the ChittyAgent registry, find its mercury-finance or cashflow-planner skill, execute the matched skill, and write the result to a local file — a complete agent-to-action finance pipeline.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 fifteenth-pass. orchestrator/agent_search returned finance agent (0.7 relevance for 'finance banking mercury'); skill_search returned mercury-finance (0.8) and cashflow-planner (0.8) for 'cashflow finance'; skill_execute returned action:local_invoke; fs/write_file confirmed. First use of agent_search → skill_search → skill_execute in a single finance chain.

combos.name: evidence-finance-brief
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate available evidence RAGs, run an AI search for financial evidence (invoice records, billing disputes, transaction documentation), reason about key financial findings, and write a structured finance brief to a local file.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 fifteenth-pass. evidence/list_rags returned 3 RAGs (chittyevidence-ksn, re-evidence-search, chittyevidence-search); evidence/ai_search with rag_id returned VERIFIED property evidence at trust 0.65; thinking confirmed; fs/write_file confirmed. Finance-specific variant of rag-aware-governance-report (governance profile).

combos.name: cashflow-skill-evidence-reasoning
combos.accomplishes: Find the cashflow-planner skill in the ChittyOS registry, search evidence RAG for financial documentation and billing patterns, then reason about cashflow projections and anomalies — a three-backend finance analysis chain that leverages skill discovery and evidence retrieval before structured reasoning.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 sixteenth-pass. orchestrator/skill_search returned cashflow-planner (chittycommand-alpha plugin, 0.8 relevance) and mercury-finance (chittyos-finance plugin, 0.8); evidence/ai_search (chittyevidence-search) confirmed returning financial context; thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed. Complements evidence-finance-brief (uses evidence/list_rags → evidence/ai_search → thinking → fs) — this variant uses skill_search as entry point.

combos.name: skill-list-evidence-finance-brief
combos.accomplishes: Finance capability intelligence brief — enumerate all available skills to surface financial capabilities in the ecosystem, search evidence for financial context and patterns, synthesize into a comprehensive finance landscape brief. Novel: skill_list + evidence pairing for finance.
combos.notes: 18th-pass 2026-06-05: skill_list (54 real skills returned LIVE this session — includes chittyos-finance:mercury-finance, chittycommand-alpha:cashflow-planner, chittycommand-alpha:obligation-tracker), evidence/ai_search (0.48 score), thinking (confirmed), fs/write_file (confirmed). First combo pairing skill_list with evidence in the finance profile.

combos.name: context7-evidence-finance-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Look up financial API or SDK documentation (e.g. Stripe SDK, Mercury API), fetch implementation examples and type signatures, cross-reference the evidence knowledge base for financial patterns and domain constraints, reason over the synthesis, and write a finance analysis — docs-first approach for the finance domain.
combos.notes: context7/resolve-library-id (direct execute 2026-06-05, TypeScript resolved), context7/query-docs (cast score 0.80 confirmed), evidence/ai_search (cast score 0.48 confirmed), thinking/sequentialthinking (direct execute confirmed), fs/write_file (cast score 0.50 confirmed). Novel: first finance combo using context7 library docs combined with evidence — docs-first approach for finance; prior finance+evidence combos omit context7.

combos.name: agent-rag-evidence-finance-reasoning
combos.accomplishes: Find the finance agent, survey available evidence RAGs for financial corpus, AI-search for specific financial data, discover relevant financial skills (cashflow-planner, mercury-finance), and reason over the combined financial landscape. Agent-entry finance chain — uses agent discovery as the entry point into evidence-driven skill routing.
combos.notes: 20th-pass: agent_search confirmed finance agent (finance.agent.chitty.cc, Mercury banking); evidence/list_rags (3 RAGs confirmed); evidence/ai_search(re-evidence-search, 'cash flow finance planning') returned real ROTH IRA cash flow data ($17/month, 12-month $204 rolling); skill_search('cashflow planner finance mercury') confirmed cashflow-planner (0.8) and mercury-finance (0.8); thinking confirmed. Novel: first finance chain to begin with agent_search → RAG survey → evidence → skill lookup (5-tool chain); prior finance chains skip agent entry or omit RAG survey.

combos.name: obligation-cashflow-evidence-plan
combos.accomplishes: Dual-skill discovery for financial planning: first surface the obligation-tracker skill to enumerate current financial/legal obligations, then the cashflow-planner skill for forecasting, cross-reference both against real RAG evidence data (ROTH IRA, account statements), then reason into a consolidated obligation-vs-cashflow plan and write it to a file.
combos.notes: obligation-tracker (0.8 relevance) and cashflow-planner (0.8 relevance) both confirmed via live skill_search. evidence/ai_search(re-evidence-search, 'cash flow finance planning ROTH') returned real ROTH IRA cash flow data ($17/month). Novel: first finance chain to use two sequential skill_search calls targeting distinct but related financial planning skills before pivoting to evidence — prior finance chains use a single skill_search.

combos.name: neon-agent-postgres-cashflow-schema
combos.accomplishes: Discover chittyagent-neon (Neon PostgreSQL ops — branch management, SQL execution, schema introspection) alongside chittyagent-finance (Mercury banking → Neon sync, cash flow, multi-entity), look up pg client documentation for the data access layer, enumerate available evidence RAGs to cross-reference financial documents, then reason into a cash-flow schema design brief bridging banking transactions and Neon schema shape.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-06 twenty-fourth-pass. agent_search('neon database sql postgres schema migration') → chittyagent-neon (0.7, unbound, neon-sql+branch-management+schema-introspection); agent_search('finance banking neon transaction') → chittyagent-finance (0.5, bound, mercury-banking+transaction-sync+neon-sync); context7/resolve-library-id('pg') → /vitaly-t/pg-promise (confirmed, High reputation); evidence/list_rags → 3 RAGs confirmed; thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed; fs/write_file confirmed. Novel: FIRST use of chittyagent-neon in catalog; first chain pairing neon agent + finance agent for schema-level cashflow design.

combos.name: token-ops-redirect-evidence-finance
combos.accomplishes: Discover the token-ops agent (chittyagent-token-ops), execute its status probe to surface auth routing info, then query evidence RAGs for financial data and synthesise a finance-auth ops brief — FIRST use of chittyagent-token-ops in a finance chain.
combos.notes: FIRST use of chittyagent-token-ops (25th-pass). agent_execute(token-ops,status) returns {action:'redirect',domain:'token-ops.agent.chitty.cc'} ✓. evidence/list_rags → 3 RAGs ✓. evidence/ai_search → real financial data ✓. thinking ✓. fs/write_file ✓. All tools confirmed 2026-06-06.

combos.name: playwright-financial-page-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Use the interactive Playwright browser (handles auth, SPAs, JS-rendered dashboards) to navigate to a financial page, capture a full screenshot, reason about the data visible, and save the analysis to a local file — distinct from browser-rendering chains which are headless URL fetches only.
combos.notes: playwright, thinking, fs all confirmed connected (2026-06-06). Distinguishes from browser-rendering chains: playwright can interact with authenticated sessions and JS-heavy finance portals. twenty-seventh-pass.

combos.name: evidence-financial-patterns-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: Perform a precise (non-AI) evidence keyword search for financial patterns or audit records, reason about the findings, and persist a summary page to Notion — uses evidence/search (exact query) rather than ai_search, giving deterministic retrieval useful when the query is well-specified.
combos.notes: evidence (3 tools), thinking, notion all confirmed connected (2026-06-06). Distinct from financial-context-brief which uses evidence/ai_search. twenty-seventh-pass.

governance.description: ChittyOS ecosystem governance, identity, evidence, and persistent state — extended with ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp), ChittyLedger (ledger-mcp), Session Coordinator (session-mcp), and ChittyEvidence canonical document store (chittyevidence). Orchestrator connected (toolCount: 13, confirmed 2026-06-05) — combos using orchestrator/agent_search and agent_list are verified:true. github NOT connected. Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in remote container — all Notion-write combos are verified:false. See individual combo verified flags.

combos.name: rag-evidence-to-notion-brief
combos.accomplishes: Discover the available AutoRAG vector stores, run an AI search across the evidence corpus, and persist the synthesized findings as a Notion brief — turning raw evidence retrieval into a governed, citable document.
combos.notes: evidence/list_rags, evidence/ai_search, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: issue-triage-to-governance-tracker
combos.accomplishes: List open GitHub issues across a repo, reason over prioritization and ownership with sequential-thinking, and write the prioritized backlog into a Notion governance/tracking database.
combos.notes: github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). thinking and notion verified. Previously verified:true when github was connected.

combos.name: skill-discover-and-execute
combos.accomplishes: Find the right ChittyOS skill for a governance task, execute it through the orchestrator, then annotate the outcome as a comment on the relevant Notion page for an audit trail. Spans orchestrator + notion.
combos.notes: orchestrator/skill_search, orchestrator/skill_execute, and notion/API-create-a-comment all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: context-provisioning-audit
combos.accomplishes: List TY-VY-RY scored ChittyID candidates for a session, run the autonomous provisioning evaluation, and archive the decision + per-aspect rationale into a Notion governance log.
combos.notes: orchestrator/provision_candidates, orchestrator/provision_evaluate, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: agent-route-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Find which ChittyAgent handles a domain task, route the request through the orchestrator's agent protocol, and append the result to an existing Notion page's body.
combos.notes: orchestrator/agent_search, orchestrator/agent_execute, and notion/API-patch-block-children all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: evidence-backed-issue
combos.accomplishes: Search the evidence corpus for prior art / supporting context, then open a GitHub issue pre-populated with the cited findings — grounding engineering work in governed evidence.
combos.notes: evidence verified. github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true.

combos.name: task-session-evidence
combos.accomplishes: Capture a governance decision as a ChittyAgent task, append it to the active session as a timestamped event, then ingest the rationale as a canonical document with a chittycanon:// URI — creating a three-layer trail: work item → session log → evidence store.
combos.notes: tasks, session, chittyevidence all in config (enabled:false). The combo models the complete governance lifecycle: intent → session context → canonical evidence.

combos.name: session-audit-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: List all active governance sessions, enumerate the events in each, reason over the event stream to identify patterns or anomalies, and render a session audit trail into Notion for human review.
combos.notes: session/list_sessions and session/list_events from apps/session-coordinator-mcp (enabled:false). thinking and notion are verified live.

combos.name: evidence-to-task-to-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Search the canonical evidence store for a governance topic, create follow-up action tasks from the findings, and append the decision to the immutable ledger — a full discover → act → record governance chain.
combos.notes: chittyevidence, tasks, ledger all in config (enabled:false). High-value three-backend governance combo: evidence informs tasks; ledger anchors the decision.

combos.name: ledger-review-to-brief
combos.accomplishes: Audit the governance ledger namespace for a topic (e.g. a session's decisions), reason over the entry stream for completeness and consistency, and produce a governance brief in Notion.
combos.notes: ledger/list_entries from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). thinking and notion are verified live.

combos.name: linear-sprint-to-governance-brief
combos.accomplishes: List active Linear projects and their completion status, reason over blockers and priorities with sequential-thinking, and write a sprint governance brief into Notion — turning engineering issue-tracker state into a governed, stakeholder-readable record.
combos.notes: linear uses mcp.linear.app/mcp (requires authTokenKey: linear-mcp). thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page are verified live.

combos.name: evidence-reasoning-brief
combos.accomplishes: AI-search the evidence corpus for a governance topic, reason over the findings with sequential-thinking to synthesize insights and flag gaps, then write a structured brief into Notion. Shortest all-verified cross-backend governance chain — three different backend domains in one intent.
combos.notes: evidence/ai_search, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05). notion reconnected this pass Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: rag-survey-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all available AutoRAG vector stores and save the inventory to a local file — a discovery-then-archive pattern for documenting what evidence knowledge bases exist without requiring Notion access.
combos.notes: evidence and fs both connected (2026-06-04). Minimal two-backend verified pattern; useful as a quick governance audit step.

combos.name: skill-dispatch-to-file
combos.accomplishes: Find the right ChittyOS skill for a governance task by keyword/intent, execute it through the orchestrator, and write the result to a local file as a durable audit record. A pure-orchestrator-plus-filesystem chain — no external service dependency.
combos.notes: orchestrator (skill_search, skill_execute) and fs (write_file) — all connected 2026-06-04.

combos.name: provision-evaluate-and-bind
combos.accomplishes: Evaluate which ChittyID context entity should serve a session using TY-VY-RY scoring, then execute the binding decision — the full ChittyID provisioning flow in two sequential orchestrator calls.
combos.notes: Pure orchestrator chain — provision_evaluate and provision_bind both confirmed live 2026-06-04.

combos.name: evidence-search-reason-write
combos.accomplishes: Search the AutoRAG evidence store for relevant documents, reason through the findings with sequential thinking to synthesise an analysis or audit summary, then write the final report to a file — a three-backend research-to-document chain.
combos.notes: evidence/search, thinking/sequentialthinking, and fs/write_file all confirmed on connected servers (2026-06-04 third pass).

combos.name: provision-candidates-report
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate provisioning candidates from the orchestrator, run the evaluation step to score each candidate, then write the ranked evaluation report to a file — a two-backend governance audit chain.
combos.notes: orchestrator/provision_candidates and orchestrator/provision_evaluate confirmed via live status (13 orchestrator tools connected, 2026-06-04 third pass). fs/write_file confirmed connected.

combos.name: web-capture-evidence-to-brief
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a web resource, capture screenshot proof, search RAG evidence for related context, then create a Notion brief combining screenshot and evidence findings
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers (playwright, evidence, notion). 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: codebase-context-reasoning

Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: linear-sprint-governance-report
combos.accomplishes: List active Linear projects and their open issues, reason over governance-relevant patterns — overdue items, issues without owners, milestone coverage gaps, policy category distribution — then write a governance-quality sprint health report to a local file.

combos.name: codebase-evidence-governance-audit
combos.accomplishes: Survey the local codebase structure, read key config and architecture files, search the evidence corpus for relevant governance policies or prior audits, reason over compliance gaps between what the code does and what policy requires, then write a governance audit report — binding local codebase state to the external evidence/policy corpus.
combos.notes: All 5 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: fs/list_directory, fs/read_text_file (fs server: toolCount 14), evidence/ai_search (1.3), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). evidence backend confirmed connected (toolCount: 3). 5-tool cross-domain chain: codebase survey then evidence context then reasoning then output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: rag-aware-governance-report

combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: evidence/list_rags (1.05), evidence/ai_search (1.3), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). Extends rag-survey-to-file (list_rags then write) with deep search and reasoning. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: capability-landscape-report
combos.accomplishes: Search the ChittyOS agent registry by capability or domain to discover which agents are available, then search the skill registry for related skills and triggers, reason over the combined capability landscape with sequential thinking to identify coverage gaps or redundancies, then write a structured capability audit to a local file.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 eleventh-pass cast probes: orchestrator/agent_search (0.75), orchestrator/skill_search (0.75), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). orchestrator backend confirmed connected (toolCount: 13). Cross-backend: orchestrator plus thinking plus fs. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: evidence-skill-discovery
combos.accomplishes: AI-search the evidence corpus for a domain topic (governance area, project concern, capability gap), then search the ChittyOS skill registry for skills that match or serve that domain, reason over the alignment between what the evidence describes and what skills are available, and write a capability-gap or coverage report — binding the organization's documented knowledge to its operational skill inventory.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass cast probes: evidence/ai_search (0.8), orchestrator/skill_search (1.13 for list-skills intent), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). NEW pairing: evidence + orchestrator not previously combined in catalog. Cross-domain: evidence corpus + ChittyOS skill registry + reasoning + file output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass cast probes: playwright/browser_navigate (1.05), playwright/browser_snapshot (0.78), evidence/ai_search (0.8), fs/write_file (0.83). NEW pairing: playwright + evidence not previously combined in catalog. Cross-domain: browser automation + evidence corpus + file output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: evidence-rag-skill-audit
combos.accomplishes: Discover available evidence RAGs, search for compliance or governance evidence, find governance-relevant skills in the skill registry, reason about compliance status and gaps, and write a structured audit report — a full evidence-informed governance chain.
combos.notes: All 5 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 fifteenth-pass. evidence/list_rags (3 RAGs) ✓; evidence/ai_search with rag_id ✓; orchestrator/skill_search (legal dispute skills confirmed: fact-governance 0.8, dispute 0.8, dispute-evidence 0.8) ✓; thinking ✓; fs/write_file ✓. combos.name: agent-search-evidence-reasoning

combos.name: registry-catalog-evidence-brief

combos.name: canon-uri-evidence-governance

combos.name: storage-agent-legal-hold-audit

design.description: Browser rendering, automation, and desktop/visual work — extended with ChittyEvidence (chittyevidence) for canonical archival of visual artifacts, and ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp) for turning design findings into tracked work items. github NOT connected. Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in remote container — Notion-write combos are verified:false. See individual combo verified flags.

combos.name: capture-archive-document
combos.accomplishes: Screenshot a live URL via Cloudflare browser-rendering, save the image to the local filesystem, then embed/reference it in a Notion page — a capture→archive→document pipeline across three backends.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_screenshot, fs/write_file, and notion/API-patch-block-children all confirmed connected (2026-06-05) Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: visual-bug-report
combos.accomplishes: Drive a real browser to the failing page, capture an accessibility snapshot (better than a screenshot for actionable detail), and file a GitHub issue with the reproduction — a QA-to-engineering handoff spanning playwright + github.
combos.notes: playwright verified. github NOT connected (0 tools, 2026-06-04). Previously verified:true.

combos.name: page-to-markdown-archive
combos.accomplishes: Convert any web page to clean Markdown via browser-rendering and save it locally — a lightweight content-capture combo for design references and competitive teardowns.
combos.notes: browser-rendering and fs connected. Verified 2026-06-04 NOTE: browser-rendering returned 401 in 15th-pass session (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation in the session noted above, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: form-fill-and-screenshot-proof
combos.accomplishes: Automate a form submission flow end-to-end and capture a screenshot proof saved to disk — verifying a UI flow works and producing visual evidence. (playwright-heavy, but fs makes the artifact durable cross-backend.)
combos.notes: playwright and fs connected. Verified 2026-06-04.

combos.name: live-page-html-to-docs
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a live page's raw HTML, cross-reference the framework/library it uses against current docs via context7, and write an implementation note into Notion — useful for reverse-engineering a design pattern.
combos.notes: Fixed context7/get-library-docs → context7/query-docs (2026-06-05). browser-rendering/get_url_html_content, context7/query-docs, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: screenshot-to-canonical-evidence
combos.accomplishes: Screenshot a live URL and ingest the resulting image as a canonical evidence document with a chittycanon:// URI — making visual design artifacts governed, citable, and retrievable by future evidence searches rather than lost in a local folder.
combos.notes: browser-rendering is verified live. chittyevidence/ingest_document from apps/evidence-mcp (enabled:false pending CHITTY_EVIDENCE_TOKEN).

combos.name: browser-test-to-task
combos.accomplishes: Drive a live browser to a design target, capture an accessibility snapshot revealing the actual DOM state, and immediately create a tracked ChittyAgent task for any issues found.
combos.notes: playwright is verified live. tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). Shortest cross-backend design-to-work-tracking combo.

combos.name: playwright-capture-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: Navigate to a design target URL, capture a full-page screenshot, and post it as a new Notion page for team review — a three-step visual documentation pipeline driven from a single cast intent.
combos.notes: playwright/browser_navigate, playwright/browser_take_screenshot, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05) Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.accomplishes: Convert a live URL to clean Markdown via browser-rendering, reason over the content with sequential-thinking to extract key design patterns or decisions, then write the synthesized brief into Notion — deeper than a raw archive, more governed than a manual note.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_markdown, thinking/sequentialthinking, and notion/API-post-page all confirmed connected (2026-06-05) Note: Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) in last recorded run environment — all notion tool calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.notes: orchestrator (skill_search, skill_execute) and fs (write_file) — all connected 2026-06-04.

combos.name: agent-inventory-to-file
combos.accomplishes: List all agents in the ChittyAgent ecosystem with their binding status, capabilities, and tool counts, then write the inventory to a local file for offline ops review or change-detection tracking.
combos.notes: orchestrator (agent_list) and fs — both connected 2026-06-04. Simplest orchestrator+fs combo.

combos.name: page-to-runbook-via-thinking
combos.accomplishes: Fetch any URL as clean markdown (status page, incident post-mortem, deployment guide), reason through the ops implications with sequential thinking, then write the resulting runbook or action plan to a file — browser-rendering + thinking + fs three-backend chain.
combos.notes: browser-rendering/get_url_markdown confirmed from existing verified combo page-to-markdown-archive. thinking/sequentialthinking and fs/write_file confirmed connected (2026-06-04 third pass) NOTE: browser-rendering returned 401 in 15th-pass session (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation in the session noted above, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: provision-bind-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Discover provision candidates for a session, evaluate and score them, bind the best fit, then document the provisioning decision and rationale in a Notion page
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed: provision_candidates/evaluate/bind from existing verified combos; notion/API-post-page confirmed. 2026-06-05 fifth-pass verification. Caveat (2026-06-05 fifth-pass env): Notion API returning 401 (invalid token) — tool is registered in connected Notion MCP but write calls will fail until token is restored via op://ChittyOS-Integrations/notion/api_token.

combos.name: config-search-to-ops-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Recursively search for configuration, deployment, or infrastructure files matching a pattern, then use sequential thinking to analyze the operational surface — identifying risks, dependencies, and runbook-relevant patterns.
combos.notes: Both steps confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-05): fs/search_files (score 0.67), thinking/sequentialthinking (score 0.55). No Notion dependency — verified independently of Notion API status.

combos.name: project-tree-to-ops-reasoning
combos.accomplishes: Inventory the full project directory tree as a recursive JSON structure, then reason through it from an operations lens — surfaces which directories hold sensitive configs, where build artifacts live, and what the deployment surface looks like.
combos.notes: Both steps confirmed via live cast probes (2026-06-05): fs/directory_tree (score 0.50), thinking/sequentialthinking (score 0.55). Same backends as tree-to-architecture-thinking but ops focus context — deployment/risk reasoning vs. architectural design. No Notion dependency.

combos.name: build-status-to-worker-logs
combos.accomplishes: List recent Workers Builds runs to identify the latest build outcome, then retrieve the deployed Worker's runtime logs to correlate build success or failure with live production behavior — closing the CI-to-production feedback loop.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected (auth via cloudflare-builds-mcp: op://ChittyOS-Integrations/cloudflare-builds-mcp/token). cloudflare not connected in remote container. Both are ops-focus servers. Tool names follow official workers-builds MCP surface: workers_builds_list_builds, workers_builds_get_build, workers_builds_get_build_logs, workers_builds_set_active_worker.

combos.name: build-triage
combos.accomplishes: List recent Workers Builds runs to surface failed build UUIDs, then fetch the full build logs for the failing run — closing the triage loop without leaving the builds MCP surface.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected in remote container. Auth via cloudflare-builds-mcp token (op://ChittyOS-Integrations/cloudflare-builds-mcp/token). workers_builds_set_active_worker only sets the active workerId for subsequent API calls (session context setter), not a build version activator — it does not belong in rollback chains.

combos.name: build-failure-triage-report
combos.accomplishes: List recent Workers Builds runs, pull the full logs for any failed run, reason over error patterns and root causes with sequential-thinking, then write a triage runbook to a local file — turning opaque CI failures into an actionable remediation plan.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected in container (auth-gated). thinking and fs are available locally. Natural extension of the build-triage combo (which stays within cloudflare-builds): adds reasoning + file persistence layer.

combos.name: build-config-review
combos.accomplishes: Fetch the Workers Builds configuration for a specific Worker, reason over it with sequential-thinking to surface potential misconfigurations (wrong build command, missing env vars, suboptimal deploy steps), then write a structured review report — turning raw config into an audit-quality recommendation.
combos.notes: cloudflare-builds not connected in container (auth-gated). 3-step: config read + reason + persist to file.

combos.name: full-provision-audit
combos.accomplishes: Run the complete ChittyID provisioning lifecycle — discover candidates for the session, score them with TY-VY-RY evaluation, execute the binding decision — then write the full decision record (candidate list, scores, rationale, binding outcome) to a local file as a durable audit trail.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass: orchestrator/provision_candidates, provision_evaluate, provision_bind all confirmed live (orchestrator toolCount: 13, confirmed via skill_list 2026-06-05). fs/write_file confirmed. Extends provision-evaluate-and-bind (which ends at bind with no file output) by adding provision_candidates at the start for a full 3-step orchestrator flow + durable file output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: orchestrator-evidence-landscape
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all ChittyAgent agents with their capabilities and binding status, then AI-search the evidence corpus for governance policies, architectural decisions, or requirements relevant to the agent landscape — reason over the alignment between registered agent capabilities and what the evidence base says the system should be able to do, writing a gap analysis or coverage audit to a local file.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed on live connected servers. 2026-06-05 twelfth-pass cast probes: orchestrator/agent_list (0.97 as alternative for list-agents intent), evidence/ai_search (0.8), thinking/sequentialthinking (1.18), fs/write_file (0.83). NEW pairing: orchestrator agent inventory + evidence corpus not previously combined in catalog. Cross-domain: ChittyOS agent registry + evidence search + reasoning + file output. No auth-gated backends required.

combos.name: skill-landscape-analysis
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all 54 ChittyOS ecosystem skills via orchestrator, reason about which ones apply to a given task category, write a prioritized skill-selection report — spans ecosystem registry + reasoning + filesystem output
combos.notes: orchestrator/skill_list confirmed live (returned 54 skills) 2026-06-05; thinking/sequentialthinking and fs/write_file confirmed live this pass

combos.name: specialist-fork-and-bind
combos.accomplishes: Fork a domain-specialist ChittyID context from a generalist parent entity (inheriting relevant expertise, pruning non-domain strengths), then bind the session to that fork — provisioning a focused agent context in one two-step flow
combos.notes: orchestrator/provision_fork confirmed live via cast (score 0.78) 2026-06-05; orchestrator/provision_bind confirmed live as cast alternative; both part of the same orchestrator backend

combos.name: skill-category-deep-dive
combos.accomplishes: List all ecosystem skills (54 total), search and filter to a specific domain (devops, finance, legal), reason about how they compose for a complex task, write a capability deep-dive — 4-step orchestrator+reasoning chain for strategic skill selection
combos.notes: orchestrator/skill_list and orchestrator/skill_search both confirmed live 2026-06-05; thinking and fs confirmed live; extends infra-health-snapshot with reasoning layer

combos.name: evidence-agent-triage
combos.accomplishes: Check the evidence base for existing ops incident records, list available agents for potential resolution routing, reason about triage priority and which agent to dispatch, and write a structured incident triage report.
combos.notes: All 5 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 fifteenth-pass. evidence/list_rags (3 RAGs) ✓; evidence/ai_search ✓; orchestrator/agent_list (28 agents returned) ✓; thinking ✓; fs/write_file ✓. NEW 5-tool evidence-to-orchestrator ops triage chain. Different from orchestrator-evidence-landscape (which goes agent_list → ai_search, not the other way).

combos.name: compliance-skill-evidence-check
combos.accomplishes: Find the chittyos-compliance skill (audits ChittyOS services against canonical standards), query the evidence RAG for prior audit findings and compliance documentation, then execute the compliance skill — a three-backend ops chain for evidence-informed service auditing.
combos.notes: All 3 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 sixteenth-pass. orchestrator/skill_search returned chittyos-compliance (chittyos-devops plugin, triggers: /chittyos-compliance, audit, certify); evidence/ai_search (chittyevidence-search) confirmed returning case endpoint facts; orchestrator/skill_execute confirmed returning action:local_invoke. First use of skill_search+evidence+skill_execute in a single ops chain.

combos.name: skill-context7-ops-research
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate all 54 ecosystem skills to surface which deployment and infrastructure technologies are covered, then resolve a specific platform's library ID in context7 and fetch its current docs, saving the combined skill-inventory-plus-documentation to a local file — an ops research chain linking what skills exist to what the underlying platform's API actually says.
combos.notes: All 4 tools confirmed live 2026-06-05 seventeenth-pass. orchestrator/skill_list returned 54 skills (confirmed); context7/resolve-library-id confirmed (MCP TS SDK at benchmark 84.4); context7/query-docs confirmed (StreamableHTTPClientTransport snippets); fs/write_file confirmed. First orchestrator/skill_list→context7 chain in catalog — combines registry enumeration with docs lookup.

combos.name: fork-bind-evidence-context
combos.accomplishes: Provision a specialist and immediately enrich with evidence context — fork a specialist entity from the generalist, bind it to the session, then search evidence for domain context relevant to the new specialist's area, and reason about its capabilities and gaps.
combos.notes: 18th-pass 2026-06-05: provision_fork (0.66 score confirmed), provision_bind (confirmed via prior sessions), evidence/ai_search (0.48 score), thinking (confirmed). First combo to continue after fork+bind with evidence lookup — extends specialist-fork-and-bind (fork→bind only) with evidence enrichment and reasoning.

combos.name: agent-evidence-skill-ops-triage
combos.accomplishes: Inventory all registered agents to understand which systems are active in the ops topology, search evidence for incident context and historical failure patterns, cross-reference the full skill registry to identify available remediation and ops skills, reason over agents + evidence + skills together to determine triage steps, and write an ops triage report — a 5-tool chain that extends orchestrator-evidence-landscape by adding skill discovery before reasoning.
combos.notes: orchestrator/agent_list (direct execute 2026-06-05, 28 agents confirmed), evidence/ai_search (cast score 0.48 confirmed), orchestrator/skill_list (direct execute 2026-06-05, 54 skills confirmed), thinking/sequentialthinking (direct execute confirmed), fs/write_file (cast score 0.50 confirmed). Novel vs orchestrator-evidence-landscape (12th-pass, 4-tool agent_list→evidence→thinking→fs): this 5-tool variant inserts skill_list between evidence and thinking, enabling cross-reference of both agent capabilities AND available skills against the evidence corpus.

combos.name: skill-execute-then-context7-runbook
combos.accomplishes: Search for and execute an ops skill (wrangler-audit, chittyos-compliance, chitty-deploy), then pull the relevant library documentation from Context7 to enrich the output, and write a complete runbook. A 'run then document' pattern — skill execution enriched with post-execution library docs.
combos.notes: 20th-pass: skill_search('wrangler audit workers devops') confirmed wrangler-audit (0.8) and chittyos-compliance (0.8); skill_execute confirmed in prior passes; context7/resolve-library-id (0.8 score); context7/query-docs confirmed; fs/write_file confirmed. Novel: first catalog chain to use skill_execute THEN context7 for post-execution documentation enrichment — prior skill+context7 chains do search-only (skill-deploy-context7-docs: skill_search→context7 without execution; skill-context7-ops-research: skill_list→context7→write without execution).

combos.name: recommendation-evidence-agent-dispatch
combos.accomplishes: Evidence-grounded recommendation-to-agent-dispatch pipeline: surface the recommendation-engine skill to understand what actions are suggested, enumerate and query RAG evidence to ground the recommendations in real data, then inventory all 28 available agents to find the right dispatch target, then reason into an ops runbook and write it.
combos.notes: skill_search('recommendation engine actions suggest') → chittycommand-alpha:recommendation-engine (0.8 relevance) confirmed. evidence/list_rags → 3 RAGs confirmed. evidence/ai_search(re-evidence-search, 'cash flow') → ROTH IRA data confirmed. orchestrator/agent_list → 28 agents confirmed. Novel: first 5-tool+ chain using recommendation-engine as entry skill; first to sequence skill_search → RAG inventory → ai_search → agent_list (reversed from prior chains that start with agent_list).

combos.name: directory-ship-agent-routing-guide
combos.accomplishes: Project-structure-aware agent routing: scan the current project's directory tree to understand its shape, use that context to search for the best dev-workflow agent (ship agent: preflight checks, brainstorming, checkpointing, branch management, 0.7 relevance), ground in evidence context, then synthesize a routing guide — 'given this project layout, here is which agent to invoke and how'.
combos.notes: fs/directory_tree confirmed (fs connected). agent_search('project development ship workflow automation') → chittyagent-ship (0.7 relevance, dev-wrap-up + preflight-checks + brainstorming + checkpointing + branch-management capabilities) confirmed, also chittyagent-autobot (0.46). evidence/ai_search(chittyevidence-search) confirmed. Novel: first chain starting with fs/directory_tree that pivots to agent_search rather than evidence or skill_search; inverts prior directory-tree chains (directory-evidence-skill-docs went tree→evidence→skill).

combos.name: market-registry-skill-audit
combos.accomplishes: Discover the market agent (ChittyMarket artifact manager), then find both the registry management skill (chitty-register) and the compliance certification skill (chittyos-compliance) to map the full ops toolset for plugin lifecycle management, and save a marketplace audit guide covering artifact install/publish + registry + compliance.
combos.notes: FIRST combo to use market agent as entry point. agent_search('market artifact plugin install publish lifecycle') → chittyagent-market (0.7 relevance, artifact-management + marketplace + plugin-install + plugin-publish, bound) confirmed 2026-06-05. skill_search('registry chitty-register manage service registry') → chittyos-devops:chitty-register (0.8 relevance) confirmed. skill_search('compliance audit scaffold certify monitor services') → chittyos-devops:chittyos-compliance (0.8 relevance) confirmed. thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed. fs/write_file confirmed.

combos.name: compliance-registry-ecosystem-snapshot
combos.accomplishes: Start from the compliance skill (chittyos-compliance: audit/scaffold/certify ChittyOS services) as the intent anchor, then discover the registry agent as the canonical service catalog, enumerate all agents in the ecosystem, reason over the full compliance + registry picture, and save a snapshot of the ecosystem's certification state.
combos.notes: Inverts the typical agent-first pattern: starts with skill_search (compliance), then discovers the registry agent, then lists all agents — skill → agent discovery → full catalog. chittyos-compliance (0.8 relevance) confirmed. chittyagent-registry (0.7 relevance) confirmed. orchestrator/agent_list → 28 real agents confirmed. thinking/sequentialthinking confirmed. fs/write_file confirmed.

combos.name: ship-deploy-pipeline-report
combos.accomplishes: Find the ship agent for dev lifecycle and preflight checks, discover the chitty-deploy skill for deploying ChittyOS services, execute the deployment, verify the build in the Cloudflare Workers Builds pipeline, and write a deployment status report — a five-step ops deployment lifecycle chain.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-05 twenty-third-pass. agent_search('autobot autonomous feature ship merge') returned chittyagent-ship (0.7 relevance, dev-wrap-up+preflight-checks+branch-management); skill_search returned chittyos-devops:chitty-deploy (0.8); skill_execute returned action:local_invoke; cloudflare-builds/workers_builds_list_builds confirmed in prior catalog. Novel: first use of chittyagent-ship in ops profile; first chain combining ship agent + deploy skill + build pipeline verification. NOTE: cloudflare-builds not connected in current environment (auth-gated); verified:true reflects historical confirmation from prior catalog sessions, not current-session reachability.

combos.name: cleaner-storage-ops-audit
combos.accomplishes: Discover the cleaner agent (AI-powered disk analysis and cleanup using Marie Kondo methodology — disk-cleanup, file-analysis, storage-optimization capabilities) and the storage agent (document-storage, R2-management, legal-holds, AI-classification capabilities), reason over the two agents' complementary roles to produce a framework for storage audit decision-making (which agent handles ephemeral disk vs. legal-hold R2 objects), then write an ops storage audit framework. Note: agent_search returns agent capabilities, not actual directory listings or R2 object inventories; executing the agents directly is required to ground the audit in real storage state.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-05 twenty-third-pass. agent_search('cleaner disk cleanup storage optimization file analysis') returned chittyagent-cleaner (0.7 relevance, bound status, disk-cleanup+file-analysis+storage-optimization) and chittyagent-storage (0.7 relevance, unbound, r2-management+legal-holds+classification); thinking/sequentialthinking (confirmed); fs/write_file (confirmed). Novel: first use of chittyagent-cleaner in catalog; first chain pairing cleaner + storage agents for ops storage audit.

combos.name: machine-management-checkpoint-ops-snapshot
combos.accomplishes: Discover the machine-management skill (stateful machine/storage inventory, cleanup, optimization cycles), invoke it to trigger an inventory scan, then discover and invoke the checkpoint skill to save session state — creating a compound operational snapshot that anchors both the machine state and session context before a cleanup cycle.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-06 twenty-fourth-pass. skill_search('machine management inventory') → workflow:machine-management (0.5 relevance); skill_execute(workflow:machine-management) → {action:'local_invoke', skill:'machine-management', instruction:'Invoke in Claude Code with: /machine-management'}; skill_search('checkpoint session state') → chittyos-core:checkpoint (0.8 relevance); skill_execute(chittyos-core:checkpoint) → {action:'local_invoke', skill:'checkpoint', instruction:'Invoke in Claude Code with: /checkpoint'}; fs/write_file confirmed. Novel: FIRST dual use of workflow:machine-management + chittyos-core:checkpoint together in one chain.

combos.name: triple-skill-context-machine-compliance
combos.accomplishes: Restore entity context (ChittyID binding, entity state, sync queue), run machine inventory to enumerate current resources, then surface and invoke the compliance audit skill (audit, scaffold, monitor, certify ChittyOS services) — producing a full operational health trifecta: who I am, what I own, and whether it's all compliant.
combos.notes: All confirmed live 2026-06-06 twenty-fourth-pass. skill_execute(chittyos-core:chittycontext) → {action:'local_invoke', skill:'chittycontext'}; skill_execute(workflow:machine-management) → {action:'local_invoke', skill:'machine-management'}; skill_search('chittyos compliance audit monitor certify') → chittyos-devops:chittyos-compliance (0.8 relevance); skill_execute(chittyos-devops:chittyos-compliance) → {action:'local_invoke', skill:'chittyos-compliance'}; fs/write_file confirmed. Novel: FIRST triple-skill chain combining chittycontext + machine-management + compliance — ops identity+inventory+audit trifecta.

combos.name: chitty-health-compliance-snapshot
combos.accomplishes: Run the chitty-health skill to check all *.chitty.cc service health endpoints, then immediately run chittyos-compliance to audit against compliance standards — combining liveness check with compliance posture into a single ops snapshot. combos.notes: FIRST use of chittyos-devops:chitty-health (25th-pass). skill_execute(chitty-health) → {action:'local_invoke'} ✓. skill_execute(chittyos-compliance) → {action:'local_invoke'} ✓. thinking ✓. fs/write_file ✓. Confirmed 2026-06-06.

combos.name: token-ops-health-compliance-ops-sweep
combos.accomplishes: Discover and probe chittyagent-token-ops for auth routing state, sweep chitty-health across all services, run compliance audit, then discover the registry agent for a full auth→health→compliance→registry ops security sweep — the broadest multi-agent ops security chain in the catalog.
combos.notes: 25th-pass: token-ops + chitty-health + compliance + registry agents in single ops chain. agent_execute(token-ops,status) → {action:'redirect'} ✓. skill_execute(chitty-health) ✓. skill_execute(chittyos-compliance) ✓. agent_search(registry) → chittyagent-registry (0.7) ✓. thinking ✓. fs ✓. Confirmed 2026-06-06.

combos.name: skill-list-register-audit

combos.notes: orchestrator (skill_list, skill_register, skill_search all confirmed, 2026-06-06), fs confirmed. First skill_list → skill_register → verify sequence in ops. twenty-seventh-pass.
